capabilities.name: RFQ & Purchase Order Management
capabilities.description: Create RFQs, send to vendors, confirm as POs, track receipts, and manage amendments.
examples: Create a multi-line RFQ and send by email
Confirm an RFQ and generate incoming shipment
Lock a PO and create an amendment

capabilities.name: Vendor Management
capabilities.description: Maintain vendor records, payment terms, supplier info, and vendor performance.
examples: Add a new vendor with supplier info
Evaluate vendor delivery performance
Set different payment terms per vendor

capabilities.name: Purchase Pricelists & Discounts
capabilities.description: Configure quantity-based supplier prices, currencies, discounts, and lead times.
examples: Set tiered pricing for a component
Apply a vendor discount on a PO line
Configure multi-currency supplier prices

capabilities.name: Procurement & Replenishment
capabilities.description: Automate purchase proposals using reordering rules, MTO, and buy routes.
examples: Create a reordering rule for stockable product
Trigger a purchase order from sales demand
Run the procurement scheduler

capabilities.name: Dropshipping
capabilities.description: Route vendor shipments directly to customers using the dropship route.
examples: Enable dropshipping on a product
Create a dropship PO from a sales order
Track dropship receipt from vendor to customer

capabilities.name: Landed Costs
capabilities.description: Allocate freight, insurance, and other landed costs to received products.
examples: Create a landed cost for an ocean shipment
Allocate freight by weight
Validate landed costs and update stock valuation

capabilities.name: Vendor Bills & Three-Way Matching
capabilities.description: Match PO, receipt, and vendor bill quantities/prices and resolve exceptions.
examples: Create a vendor bill from a PO receipt
Detect a quantity mismatch between receipt and bill
Approve a price exception for invoicing

capabilities.name: Purchase Agreements & Blanket Orders
capabilities.description: Use purchase requisitions and blanket orders to manage long-term vendor agreements.
examples: Create a blanket order with a vendor
Generate RFQs from a purchase requisition
Compare vendor quotations in a tender

capabilities.name: Purchase Approval Workflows
capabilities.description: Configure PO approval thresholds, multi-level sign-offs, and team rules.
examples: Set a purchase approval threshold by amount
Route high-value POs to a manager
Define team-based buyers
